community_clinic.description: Community Clinic — free primary care, nearest to home
community_clinic.when_to_go: Minor illnesses, routine checkups, family planning, vaccination

upazila_health_complex.description: Upazila Health Complex — free government hospital
upazila_health_complex.when_to_go: Moderate illness, referral from community clinic, general OPD

district_hospital.description: District General Hospital — larger government facility
district_hospital.when_to_go: Conditions requiring specialist care or minor surgery

medical_college_hospital.when_to_go: Complex conditions, serious illness, specialist consultation

major_hospitals_dhaka.name: National Institute of Diseases of Chest and Hospital (NIDCH)
